creator: jin@adv-pc-1.lbl.gov
text:
The IDE disk is the primary disk, and the SCSI disk are for
	labeling only.  However, in trying to use any of this SCSI
	dirves for a swap (second swap), the system will hang after
	newfs the /dev/rwd0a.  The system has to be reseted.
	As long as, no second swap area on the SCSI disks, I can
	configure these SCSI disks as some file systems w/o problem.
	So, the problem is that cannot use SCSI as second swap area.
	I haven't try to use one (1) SCSI controller + two (2) SCSI
	disks yet. I will do it tommorow. If a direct email address
	can be given to me, I will send the result to that email
	address. Otherwise, I will use send-pr only if the problem
	happens.

Fix: 

This may just be the installer problem.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Following the Environment.
